originalTitle: ServiceNow’s stock rises as earnings show momentum in cybersecurity
summary: Against a gloomy backdrop for software sentiment, ServiceNow just topped revenue expectations.
content: Against a gloomy backdrop for software sentiment, ServiceNow just topped revenue expectations.
chineseTitle: 随着盈利显示网络安全势头强劲，ServiceNow 股价上涨
chineseSummary: 在软件市场情绪低迷的背景下，ServiceNow 刚刚超出了收入预期。
chineseContent: 在软件市场情绪低迷的背景下，ServiceNow 刚刚超出了收入预期。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
